preconditions: cls must have at least one of the ordering methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__, __eq__)
postconditions: cls has all six ordering methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__, __eq__, __ne__)
the ordering methods are consistent with each other

preconditions: cls must be a subclass of object
edge_cases: if cls has __eq__ method, it will be used to implement __lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__ methods

groq_only: cls must have at least one of the ordering methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__, __eq__)
hf_only: cls must be a subclass of object

groq_only: cls has all six ordering methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__, __eq__, __ne__)
the ordering methods are consistent with each other

hf_only: if cls has __eq__ method, it will be used to implement __lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__ methods
